summary: Phase 15.2 Sparks spending endpoints testing completed. All 6 spending endpoints functional with correct error handling. AI chat-starter integration working with gemini-2.5-flash. Discover endpoint includes is_highlighted field. Privacy invisible_browsing feature verified.
passed_tests: GET /api/me/sparks - Returns balance, earning rates, spending rates, and packages
GET /api/admin/sparks/{user_id} - Admin can view user's sparks balance and ledger
POST /api/admin/sparks/{user_id}/adjust - Admin can credit/debit sparks with audit log
POST /api/sparks/spend/boost - Spends 30 sparks, creates boost with 1h expiry, returns 409 for duplicate
POST /api/sparks/spend/highlight - Spends 15 sparks, sets 24h highlight, returns 409 for duplicate
POST /api/sparks/spend/super-like - Spends 10 sparks, marks like as super, returns 429 for duplicate within 24h
POST /api/sparks/spend/extra-unlock-request - Spends 8 sparks, increments unlock credit
POST /api/sparks/spend/gift-premium-week - Spends 80 sparks, extends recipient premium by 7 days, creates subscription row
POST /api/sparks/spend/chat-starter - Spends 3 sparks, returns 3 German AI-generated conversation starters using gemini-2.5-flash
Insufficient sparks handling - Returns HTTP 402 with German message 'Nicht genug Sparks. Benötigt: X.'
GET /api/discover - Response includes 'is_highlighted' boolean field for profiles with active highlight
Privacy invisible_browsing - When enabled, viewing profiles does NOT create visit records in db.visits
Phase 15.1 regression - Balance, ledger, daily_login, admin adjust, RBAC all working

boost_spending.duplicate_handling: 409 Conflict with German message 'Du hast bereits einen aktiven Boost.'
boost_spending.creates_db_row: db.boosts with boost_id, started_at, ends_at, source='sparks_purchase'

highlight_spending.duplicate_handling: 409 Conflict with German message 'Dein Profil ist bereits hervorgehoben.'

super_like_spending.duplicate_handling: 429 Too Many Requests with German message

extra_unlock_spending.no_album_check: Accepts any album_id >= 10 chars (credit applies generically)

gift_premium_spending.effect: Extends recipient premium_expires_at by 7 days from max(now, current expiry)

chat_starter_spending.llm_failure_handling: Returns 503 WITHOUT spending sparks if AI fails
sample_output: Eros, bei so einem offiziellen Profil frage ich mich, ob ich hier direkt beim Liebesgott persönlich gelandet bin.
Mit 99 Jahren auf dem Buckel muss der Herr Eros ja so einige Liebesgeschichten erlebt und gesammelt haben.
Selbst ein offizielles Profil kann die Neugier nicht dämpfen, welche Botschaften das Team von Eros sonst noch so schickt.

discover_is_highlighted.privacy: Does not leak exact expiry timestamp

invisible_browsing.effect: Viewing profiles does NOT create/update db.visits rows
